title: The Trans-Pacific Trade War Is Heating Up Again

section_path_text: The Trans-Pacific Trade War Is Heating Up Again
summary:
Main
By Ulf Bergman
News on the trade tensions between the U.S. and China have fallen into relative obscurity in recent months, with other areas of contention dominating the reporting. While the trade frictions have continued to simmer below the surface, the inauguration of a new U.S.
